zh.Ruan Lanihorne, Cornwall, England: 英國可瓦爾阮 拉尼恩
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas L' Arcedekne於大約1275年出生在英國可瓦爾時，他的父親Otes L' Arcedekne21歲，母親Amice of Saltash17歲。他於1306年之前與Elizabeth de la Roche結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1331年8月21日之前在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.Ruan Lanihorne, Cornwall, England: 英国可瓦爾阮 拉尼恩
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas L' Arcedekne于大约1275年出生在英国可瓦爾时，他的父亲Otes L' Arcedekne21岁，母亲Amice of Saltash17岁。他于1306年之前与Elizabeth de la Roche结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1331年8月21日之前在他的家乡，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas L' Arcedekne was born about 1275, in Cornwall, England, his father, Otes L' Arcedekne, was 21 and his mother, Amice of Saltash, was 17. He married Elizabeth de la Roche before 1306. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died before 21 August 1331, in his hometown, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas L' Arcedekne est né environ 1275, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Otes L' Arcedekne, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Amice of Saltash, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de la Roche avant 1306. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé avant 21 août 1331, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas L' Arcedekne um 1275 in Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Otes L' Arcedekne 21 und seine Mutter Amice of Saltash 17. Er hat vor 1306 Elizabeth de la Roche geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 21. August 1331 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas L' Arcedekne è nato il circa 1275 nel Cornwall, England, il suo padre, Otes L' Arcedekne, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Amice of Saltash, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth de la Roche prima del 1306. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 21 agosto 1331, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.Devon, England: イギリスイギリスデボン
ja.lifeSummary: Thomas L' Arcedekneが約1275年にイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父Otes L' Arcedekneは21歳，母Amice of Saltashは17歳であった。1306年以前にElizabeth de la Rocheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1331年8月21日以前に故郷で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas L' Arcedekne(이)가 대략 1275년 영국 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Otes L' Arcedekne(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Amice of Saltash(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1306년 이전 Elizabeth de la Roche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1331년 8월 21일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

mn.about 1275–before 21 August 1331: ойролцоогоор 1275 он–1331 оны Наймдугаар сарын 21–наас өмнө

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas L' Arcedekne nasceu aproximadamente 1275, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Otes L' Arcedekne, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Amice of Saltash, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de la Roche antes 1306. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu antes 21 de agosto de 1331, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas L' Arcedekne родился около 1275 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени Otes L' Arcedekne было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Amice of Saltash, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de la Roche перед 1306 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер перед 21 августа 1331 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности Англия.

sm.about 1275–before 21 August 1331: e tusa o le 1275–a'e le'I oo le 21 Aukuso 1331

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas L' Arcedekne nació aproximadamente 1275, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, Otes L' Arcedekne, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Amice of Saltash, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Elizabeth de la Roche antes de 1306. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió antes de 21 de agosto de 1331, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra.
